promoted_facts.fact: Operations Manual is 575 pages covering 19 topic areas
SBF spending breakdown: Ad Production 34%, Product Cost Equalization 27%, Marketing Research 12%, Admin 7%
SMF spending breakdown: Digital/Internet 53%, TV 27%, Agency 11%, Radio 2%, Research 5%
BTF spending breakdown: Software/Services 55%, Satellite/Internet 16%, Support 15%, Cybersecurity 13%
Technology system cost range: $72K-$182K based on stall count
Franchise Advisory Council: 40 members, 8 executive committee, 13 regional, 3 task groups (53 members). Advisory only.
POS annual maintenance: $4K-$8K mandatory; $1K-$5K optional field services

facts_already_in_canonical: All major financial, fee, territory, and contract facts were already promoted. The above are operational detail enrichments.
